scripts.dev:kill: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Puerto 3000 liberado'"
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:kill && concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev"
